en.title: 128 GPUs, 4 days — Baidu Baige powers LLaVA-OneVision-1.5, a new record in multimodal training efficiency
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: LLaVA-OneVision-1.5 pretrained an 8B multimodal model in just 4 days on 128 A800 GPUs with performance rivaling top-tier large models — powered by Baidu Baige's AIAK training framework, the predecessor of LoongForge.

zh.title: 128 卡 4 天时间！百度百舸助力 LLaVA-OneVision-1.5 刷新多模态大模型训练效率纪录
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: LLaVA-OneVision-1.5 在 128 张 A800 上仅用 4 天完成 8B 多模态模型预训练，性能媲美顶级大模型；底层由百度百舸 AIAK 训练框架（LoongForge 的前身）提供全链路加速。

en.title: Announcing LoongForge — Baidu Baige open-sources its omni-modal training framework: one codebase for GPU and Kunlun XPU, up to 45% faster multimodal training
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: Baidu Baige open-sources LoongForge — one codebase across NVIDIA GPU and Kunlun XPU, 15%–50% end-to-end speedups on mainstream models, up to 4.8x on DeepSeek V3.2, 90%+ linear scaling on 5000+-card clusters.

zh.title: 百度百舸开源全模态训练框架 LoongForge：一套代码跑通 GPU 与昆仑芯，多模态训练提速 45%
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: 百度百舸正式开源多模态训练框架 LoongForge：一套代码覆盖 NVIDIA GPU 与昆仑芯 XPU，主流模型端到端加速 15%~50%，DeepSeek V3.2 提速 4.8 倍，5000+ 卡集群线性扩展效率 90%+。

en.title: LoongForge v0.1.0 Release Notes
en.author: The LoongForge Team
en.summary: First public release of LoongForge. Broad model coverage across LLM/VLM/VLA/Diffusion, Adaptive FP8, MoE optimizations, and native NVIDIA GPU & Kunlun XPU.

zh.title: LoongForge v0.1.0 Release
zh.author: LoongForge 团队
zh.summary: LoongForge 首个对外版本：LLM/VLM/VLA/Diffusion 四类模态全覆盖，自适应 FP8、MoE 优化，原生支持 NVIDIA GPU 与昆仑 XPU。
